oai_dc:dc.dc:title: Diagnostic testing and sample selection made easy (or at least easier)
oai_dc:dc.dc:creator: Magstadt, Drew
oai_dc:dc.dc:description: Diagnostic testing can aid beef and dairy operations and their veterinarians by timely and accurately diagnosing clinical disease and reducing risk of disease transmission. The value of test results is highly dependent on the presence of a well-defined diagnostic question and collection/preservation of valid samples to answer that question. Knowledge of commonly used assays and which samples have been validated for their use is critical along with an understanding of what results truly mean. Veterinarians can positively impact the process through communication of accurate/complete clinical observations and necropsy exam findings.
oai_dc:dc.dc:source: American Association of Bovine Practitioners Conference Proceedings; Vol. 58 No. 2 (2025): 2025 AABP Annual Conference Proceedings; 137
oai_dc:dc.dc:rights: Copyright (c) 2026 American Association of Bovine Practitioners
